content:
🔥 SkyRift-server | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as the backend infrastructure for a multiplayer online role-playing game, handling all server-side game logic and state management.
✨ Key Features: • Authorization (registration, login, tokens) • User and character management • Character classes, skills, and effects • Inventory, equipment, and items • Locations, spawns, tile maps, and teleports
📖 Summary: SkyRift Server is the TypeScript backend for a multiplayer RPG, managing game world simulation, player progression, combat, quests, inventory, and NPC interactions. It utilizes NestJS for a modular architecture, separating persistent domain logic from real-time game simulation.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
